customer_pairing_code_expired.notes: Pairing code TTL has elapsed; client must request a fresh code (HTTP 410).

customer_pairing_code_not_found.notes: Pairing code unknown (already claimed or never minted) (HTTP 404).

customer_pairing_code_missing_store.notes: Pairing code row exists but has no StoreId; defensive guard (HTTP 409).

customer_pairing_no_store_assignment.notes: Device exists but Group attribute is empty/missing (HTTP 409).

customer_pairing_code_collision.notes: Failed to allocate a non-colliding pairing code after retries (HTTP 503).

customer_pairing_invalid_json_body.notes: Request body was not parseable JSON (HTTP 400).

customer_pairing_unauthorized.notes: Cloud bearer token missing/invalid on device-side endpoint (HTTP 401).
